name: Podcast Marketing Planner
description: Podcast Marketing Planner - Marketing template for content professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Show Strategy Define podcast goals, audience, and format. 2. Episode Planner Plan episodes with topics, guests, and publish dates. 3. Guest Manager Track guest outreach, confirmations, and logistics. 4. Production Workflow Manage recording, editing, and publishing pipeline. 5. Promotion Plan Coordinate multi-channel episode promotion. 6. Content Repurposing Plan how to turn episodes into multiple content pieces. 7. Performance Tracker Monitor downloads, engagement, and growth metrics. 8. Monetisation Tracker Track sponsorships, ad revenue, and partnerships.

sections.title: Performance Tracker
sections.description: Configuration and tracking for Performance Tracker
